name: White Chocolate Raspberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Melt the white chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
3. Cut the butter into tablespoon pieces and place in the bowl of a mixer.
4. Mix the butter until smooth, then slowly add the melted chocolate until incorporated.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, incorporating each before adding more.
6. Add the sugar, then the flour to the mixture.
7. Grease a 9-by-11-inch baking pan lightly.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
9. Place the pan in the oven and bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
10. Remove the cake from the oven when it is cooked through and let cool before removing from the pan.
11. Cut the cake into individual portions and top with fresh raspberries.
12. Serve with whipped cream or raspberry sauce, if desired.
